induction_input: The cake the chef baked burned.
The bill the senator proposed passed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The dog the child chased escaped.
The letter the secretary typed arrived.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a reduced relative clause modifying the subject, following the pattern: "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using a reduced relative clause modifying the subject, following the pattern: "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]."

The cake the chef baked disappeared.
